title: nepeta cataria f. laurentii
intro: Nepeta cataria f. laurentii, also known as catmint, is a cultivar of the catmint plant (Nepeta cataria) that is valued for its distinct foliage and ornamental qualities. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Nepeta cataria f. laurentii include its ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its potential to help manage pain and reduce fever. Nepeta cataria f. laurentii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies, such as ointments and salves, to support skin and wound healing.
